prompt: A new player is joining the table next session. Their name is Jordan. Walk me through getting their voice profile set up so the transcription system can identify them.

assertions.text: Mentions the shattered-audio enroll command with correct syntax
Recommends recording at least 30 seconds of speech for profile quality
Mentions config.yaml channel_priors for mic-to-speaker mapping
Suggests a verification step (test session or short recording)
